title: acourtia humboldtii
intro: Acourtia humboldtii, also known as Humboldt's daisy or yerba de la montaña, is a perennial plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Acourtia humboldtii include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, while also providing relief from fever, cough, and sore throats. Herbal preparations of Acourtia humboldtii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
